Defines memory-related API constants and declarations for the RockyJS environment.

# Purpose
This C header file defines a constant and declares an external variable related to memory management in the context of the `Rocky` API. The `#pragma once` directive ensures the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. The `ROCKY_API_MEMORY_HEADROOM_DESIRED_SIZE_BYTES` macro specifies a desired size of 256 bytes for memory headroom. The `MEMORY_APIS` variable is declared as an external constant of type `RockyGlobalAPI`, indicating it is defined elsewhere and provides a set of memory-related API functions or configurations. The file includes `rocky_api.h`, which likely contains necessary type definitions and function declarations used in conjunction with the `Rocky` API.
